candidate_install_routes: System/container-runtime installation route; verify platform permissions and security policy before use.
minimal_fixture: Version probe plus image manifest only; do not run unknown images.
required_run_evidence: exact command line or workflow step
reference/index/database name and version when applicable
input file manifest and sample metadata boundary
logs, warnings, QC metrics, and failure messages
stop_conditions: tool is unavailable in the current environment and no container/install plan is provided
version, command, reference/index, inputs, outputs, or logs are missing
private clinical data or unpublished data lack explicit local handling boundaries
the result is being used to claim mechanism, causality, clinical utility, or publication readiness without independent validation
image source, digest/tag, volume mounts, or data egress boundaries are unclear
task_intent: Docker bounded availability probe or launcher/source-packet plan
environment_note: current local PATH/Python/R environment unless a verified container or workflow runtime is supplied
evidence_boundary: Per-tool wrapper config only; not installation, execution, benchmark, or biological validation.
